tickets.description: Define shared TypeScript types for menu categories, menu items, orders, order statuses, and app settings to be used by frontend and backend.
constraints: Export all types from this file
tickets.worker_done_criteria: src/types.ts exports interfaces Category, MenuItem, Order, OrderStatus enum, and Settings interface
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify types cover all fields described in PRD and are consistent with backend models

tickets.description: Set up SQLite database schema and SQLAlchemy ORM models for categories, menu items, orders, and settings with relationships and constraints.
constraints: Define models for Category, MenuItem, Order, OrderItem, Settings
tickets.worker_done_criteria: models.py defines SQLAlchemy models matching TypeScript types, including relationships and constraints
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify models create tables with correct columns and relationships

tickets.description: Create FastAPI app skeleton with SQLite database connection, dependency injection for DB session, and CORS middleware for local network.
constraints: Allow CORS for all origins on local network
tickets.worker_done_criteria: main.py defines FastAPI app with DB session dependency and CORS middleware configured
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify app starts without errors and DB session is injectable

tickets.description: Implement WebSocket manager backend utility to handle multiple clients, broadcast messages, and support reconnection logic.
constraints: Support adding/removing clients and broadcasting messages
tickets.worker_done_criteria: websocket_manager.py exports WebSocketManager class with connect, disconnect, and broadcast methods
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify WebSocketManager can handle multiple clients and broadcast messages

tickets.description: Create React project setup with Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS configured for mobile-first design and orange/yellow accent colors.
constraints: Configure Tailwind with custom colors for orange and yellow accents
tickets.worker_done_criteria: vite.config.ts configures React and TypeScript, main.tsx renders root app, tailwind.config.js defines theme colors
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify app builds and renders a blank page with Tailwind styles applied

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoint to serve categories CRUD: list, create, update, delete, and reorder categories.
constraints: Use dependency injection for DB session
tickets.worker_done_criteria: categories.py exports APIRouter with endpoints GET /categories, POST /categories, PUT /categories/{id}, DELETE /categories/{id}, PATCH /categories/reorder
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify endpoints persist changes in DB and return correct JSON

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoint to serve menu items CRUD with photo upload handling and availability toggle.
constraints: Save photos to local uploads directory with max 5MB size
tickets.worker_done_criteria: menu_items.py exports APIRouter with endpoints GET /menu-items, POST /menu-items (with photo upload), PUT /menu-items/{id}, DELETE /menu-items/{id}
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify photo uploads save files and menu items persist with correct data

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for orders: submit new order, list orders with timestamps, update order status, and daily sales summary.
constraints: Support order status updates and daily sales aggregation
tickets.worker_done_criteria: orders.py exports APIRouter with POST /orders, GET /orders, PATCH /orders/{id}/status, GET /orders/sales-summary
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify orders can be created, status updated, and sales summary returns correct data

tickets.description: Implement backend API endpoints for app settings: get and update cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN.
constraints: Settings stored in single row in DB
tickets.worker_done_criteria: settings.py exports APIRouter with GET /settings and PUT /settings endpoints
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify settings can be retrieved and updated correctly

tickets.description: Integrate all API routers into FastAPI app and serve built React frontend from / route with static files.
constraints: Use FastAPI StaticFiles to serve frontend build
tickets.worker_done_criteria: main.py imports and includes all API routers and serves frontend static files at /
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify API endpoints and frontend are accessible from same port

tickets.description: Implement backend WebSocket endpoints for real-time order status updates and admin new order notifications.
tickets.worker_done_criteria: websocket.py exports APIRouter with /ws/orders and /ws/admin endpoints supporting real-time updates
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify WebSocket connections can be established and messages broadcasted

tickets.description: Implement React frontend page to browse menu by category, display item photos, descriptions, and prices, and add items to cart with quantity controls.
tickets.interaction_spec: User opens app, sees categories and items grouped, taps + or - to adjust quantity, items added to cart state
constraints: Fetch categories and menu items from /api
tickets.worker_done_criteria: MenuBrowse fetches categories and items, renders grouped list with MenuItemCard components that allow quantity changes
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify categories and items display correctly, quantity controls update cart state
qa_cmd: Open browser and verify menu browsing

tickets.description: Implement React frontend cart component showing selected items, quantities, total price, and submit order button.
tickets.interaction_spec: User adds items from menu, cart updates in real-time, user taps submit to send order
constraints: Use React context or props for cart state
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Cart component displays items with quantities and total, submits order and handles response
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify cart updates with menu actions and order submission works with confirmation
qa_cmd: Submit order and check backend DB

tickets.description: Implement React frontend order confirmation page showing order number and real-time order status updates via WebSocket.
tickets.interaction_spec: After submitting order, user sees confirmation with order number and status updates in real-time (Preparing → Ready → Picked Up)
constraints: Use WebSocket client to connect to /ws/orders
tickets.worker_done_criteria: OrderConfirmation page displays order number and listens to WebSocket for status updates
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify real-time status updates appear and UI changes accordingly
qa_cmd: Submit order and watch status updates

tickets.description: Implement React frontend admin login page with PIN input and validation against backend settings.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin enters PIN, clicks submit, backend validates PIN, on success navigates to admin panel, on failure shows error
constraints: Use fetch to GET settings and validate PIN locally or via API call
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminLogin page allows PIN input, validates against backend PIN, and navigates on success
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify correct PIN allows access, wrong PIN shows error
qa_cmd: Attempt login with default and wrong PIN

tickets.description: Implement React frontend admin panel menu management page with full CRUD for categories and menu items including photo upload and availability toggle.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin can add/edit/delete categories and menu items, upload photos, toggle availability, and reorder categories
constraints: Use fetch to call backend API endpoints
Use controlled forms and file inputs
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminMenu page renders categories and items with forms supporting CRUD and photo upload
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify all CRUD operations work and photos upload correctly

tickets.description: Implement React frontend admin panel orders page showing incoming orders with timestamps, real-time updates, and status update buttons.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin sees list of orders, new orders appear in real-time, admin clicks buttons to update status
constraints: Use WebSocket client for real-time updates
Use fetch to PATCH order status
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminOrders page displays orders with timestamps, listens to WebSocket, and updates status on button clicks
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify real-time order notifications and status updates work correctly

tickets.description: Implement React frontend admin panel daily sales summary page showing aggregated sales data for the current day.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin opens sales summary page and sees total sales and itemized breakdown for the day
constraints: Display data in a simple table or list
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminSalesSummary page fetches and displays daily sales data
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify sales summary matches orders in DB
qa_cmd: Check sales summary after placing orders

tickets.description: Implement React frontend admin panel settings page to configure cart name, operating hours, and admin PIN with validation.
tickets.interaction_spec: Admin edits settings fields, submits form, backend updates settings, UI shows success or error
constraints: Use fetch to GET and PUT /api/settings
Validate PIN is numeric and 4 digits
tickets.worker_done_criteria: AdminSettings page fetches current settings and allows updates with validation
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify settings persist and validation works

tickets.description: Implement React frontend global error handling with non-blocking toast notifications for network errors, photo upload failures, and WebSocket disconnects with retry option.
tickets.interaction_spec: When network or upload errors occur, user sees toast with message and retry button; WebSocket disconnect triggers auto-reconnect with backoff and toast
constraints: Use React context or hooks for toast state
tickets.worker_done_criteria: Toast component displays messages and retry buttons, useToast hook manages toast state and retry logic
tickets.qa_done_criteria: Verify toasts appear on simulated errors and retry triggers correct actions
qa_cmd: Simulate network failure and photo upload error
